---
title: "Assignment 4"
description: "Assignment 4 uploaded to website"
author: 
  - name: Divad Chaudhary
  - affiliation: Department of Economics, University of Winnipeg
categories: [Quarto, R, Data Analysis]
citation: 
  url: https://divad119.github.io/Divad-Chaudhary-Website-4-/Blog/Assignment%204/
draft: false
format: html
---

click [here](econ_2204_assignment_4.pdf)
